content_body: Thank you for letting us forget the crazy world behind us. For the first few hours we could not figure out the TV. So what...as I look back. For what? The world is on lockdown. Grocery stores are empty, until they get restocked again. Getting up to freshly brewed coffee, looking into the field and seeing deer and ducks. The beautiful sounds of the spring trickling down, the sun coming up over the mountain, making a fire, watching the flames soar high, then back down. Put more wood on the fire only to be caught in the stare of the fire. Yes, it has been so romantic too. Snuggle up in the bed, walking hand-in-hand to the creek, and just gazing into each other's eyes. Now the car is packed, ready to enter the world again. Thank you for our little cabin. We will never forget! Ocala, FL
title: Escaping a Crazy World
